name: Smoked Chicken Club Sandwich
recipeIngredient: Salt and freshly ground black pepper
8 oz Thinly sliced smoked chicken breast
1 Kirby cucumber (seeded and thinly sliced, 1-2 slices)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon until it becomes crisp.
2. In a blender or food processor, puree the olives, Dijon mustard, anchovy paste, olive oil, vinegar, and garlic. Season with salt and pepper and adjust the amount of vinegar for tanginess.
3. Toast the bread lightly. Drain the bacon on paper towels.
4. To assemble: Spread each slice of bread (except the bottom) with the olive mixture. Place some bacon on the bottom slice, then add tomato slices, onion slice, chicken breast, and cucumber slices. Season each layer lightly as you go.
5. Top with the remaining slices of bread, ensuring the olive mixture side is down. Repeat with the second layer of fillings and finish with the third slice of bread, olive mixture side down.
6. Assemble a second sandwich using the same method.
Yield: 2 servings
